CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2024 Set For Trial On Dec-01-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-20-2024 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS DONALD HO, DAE HUH, ORANGE FUND 1 LLC, ORANGE DAO LLC, YC ALUM PARTNERS LLC, AND ORANGE FUND GP LLC'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants' demurrer to the first amended complaint (FAC) is overruled. Defendants first say they "cannot understand which entity Plaintiff is referring to throughout the pleading" - i.e., "which defendant was responsible for what action." (Memo. 3:22-4:2.) But each FAC count begins by stating which defendants are targeted therein, and alter ego is adequately pled. (FAC 4:19-6:15.) Defendants next say they are not employers because their entities are "decentralized autonomous organizations" dealing in cryptocurrency. (Memo. 5:10-6:4.) These are issues not resolvable at the pleading stage; the FAC adequately alleges employer status. (FAC 6:16-7:7.) Breach of contract and conversion are also adequately pled. (FAC 11:15-12:3, 19:4-23.) The implied covenant of good faith is properly pled in the alternative. (See Adams v. Paul (1995) 11 Cal.4th 583, 593.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-20-2024 Off Calendar

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS ORION PARROTT'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies). Upon compliance, demurrer may be re-set; papers shall bear new hearing date.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
